arts.ttl: Real Madrid accelerate Arsenal and Tottenham transfer plan as North London Derby visit scheduled
arts.sum: According to Spanish publication Defensa Central, Real Madrid have sent their chief scout, Juni Calafat, to North London this weekend to take a closer look at William Saliba and Cristian Romero. The Spanish giants were heavily linked with a few players from either side during the summer transfer window but, after breaking the bank to sign Kylian Mbappe, moves failed to materialise.
